title: URAファイナルズ決勝の後に・勝利！

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text: Arrrgh! I was so close! So close!

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text: But... it was still a good race. I accept my defeat!

text_block_list.name: Bitter Glasse
text_block_list.text:
...All right! I'm gonna go home and train my guts
out! First up, dragging a tire around for a hundred
laps!

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text:
...I concede that I wasn't strong enough to win
today.

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text:
However, I won't lose next time. Not as an
individual or at the Unity Cup.

text_block_list.name: Little Cocon
text_block_list.text:
Until we meet again. And... congratulations on
your victory.
